# Pokemon Card API

> A comprehensive Pokemon Trading Card Game database API with 22,755 cards across all sets.

## What This API Does

- Search Pokemon cards by name, set, rarity, card number, and holo type
- Get detailed card metadata: HP, types, illustrator, images
- Browse all sets and rarities
- Access high-resolution card images

## Database Stats

- 22,755 total cards
- All official TCG sets from Base Set to present
- Card images hosted on TCGdex CDN
- Updated regularly with new releases

## API Endpoints

Base URL: https://pokecardapi.com/api

### Search Cards
GET /api/cards/search?q={query}&set={set}&rarity={rarity}&number={number}&holo={holo}&limit={limit}

Parameters:
- q: Search query (card name, can include number like "charizard 4" or "pikachu 25/102")
- set: Filter by set name
- rarity: Filter by rarity (Common, Uncommon, Rare, Rare Holo, etc.)
- number: Filter by card number
- holo: Filter by holo type (holo, reverse, non-holo)
- limit: Max results (default 10)

Example: /api/cards/search?q=charizard&set=base%20set&limit=5

### Get Single Card
GET /api/cards/{tcgdex_id}

Example: /api/cards/base1-4 (Base Set Charizard)

### List All Sets
GET /api/sets

Returns array of all set names.

### List All Rarities
GET /api/rarities

Returns array of all rarity types.

## Card Data Structure

{
  "tcgdex_id": "base1-4",
  "name": "Charizard",
  "set_name": "Base Set",
  "local_id": "4",
  "rarity": "Rare Holo",
  "image_url": "https://assets.tcgdex.net/en/base/base1/4",
  "category": "Pokemon",
  "hp": 120,
  "types": "[\"Fire\"]",
  "illustrator": "Mitsuhiro Arita",
  "has_holo": 1,
  "has_reverse": 0
}

## Example Queries

Search for Pikachu cards:
/api/cards/search?q=pikachu

Search for Base Set holos:
/api/cards/search?set=base%20set&holo=holo

Search by card number:
/api/cards/search?q=charizard%204

Get all Rare Holo cards:
/api/cards/search?rarity=rare%20holo&limit=50

## Access

Free tier: 10 results per search
Full API access available via RapidAPI

## Contact

API documentation: https://pokecardapi.com/docs
